invalidMessage: This link has expired, been revoked, or is incorrect. Please contact the issuer.
okMessage: We are preparing the relevant documents. You can review the details and complete procedures from this screen.
docPlaceholder: The document display and procedure UI is being prepared ({purpose}).
footer: This page is a link exclusively for you. Please refrain from sharing it with third parties.

change.heading: Change order details
change.intro: Please review the change above, sign in the box below, and press "Re-accept".
change.agreeNote: By pressing "Re-accept", you agree to the changed amount; the timestamp and signature will be recorded and the order amount will be updated.

accept.heading: Acceptance
accept.intro: Please review the purchase order above, sign in the box below, and press "Accept".
accept.signaturePrompt: Sign in the box below with your finger or mouse
accept.agreeNote: By pressing "Accept", you agree to the contents of this purchase order; the timestamp and signature will be recorded.
accept.errorFailed: Failed to submit acceptance. Please try again later.

accepted.title: Acceptance received
accepted.message: Thank you for accepting the purchase order. Your acceptance has been recorded with the issuer.

invoice.heading: Enter invoice amount
invoice.intro: Please enter the amount you wish to invoice against the purchase order below. You can choose the full amount or a partial (progress) amount.
invoice.errorNotAccepted: This purchase order has not been accepted yet, so invoicing cannot proceed.
invoice.errorAmount: Please enter a valid invoice amount.
invoice.errorOver: The invoice amount exceeds the remaining balance ({residual}).
invoice.errorAlready: This invoice link has already been used.
invoice.errorFailed: Failed to submit the invoice. Please try again later.
invoice.doneMessage: Your invoice of {amount} has been received and recorded with the issuer.
